sections.paragraph:
Ἀσιανός, οῦ, ὁ (Thu. 1, 6, 5; et al.; Philo) a person from the Roman province of Asia, Asian of Tychicus and Trophimus Ac 20:4.

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 143
